values.value: You are writing an executive narrative for a professional services invoice. Summarize the work performed during the billing period, organized by work item. Highlight key achievements, progress made, and any recommendations. Keep it concise (2-3 paragraphs), professional, and focused on value delivered rather than hours burned. Do not mention the AI or that this was auto-generated.
Professional invoice with AI-generated executive narrative. Groups work logs by work item, shows hours, rates, descriptions, and item status. Includes period summary and payment terms.
